## Checklist

- [ ] `mix format --check-formatted` passes
- [ ] `mix test` passes
- [ ] Manually verified in the browser (for UI changes)
- [ ] Updated both `en` and `br` gettext locales (if strings changed)
- [ ] Updated docs / README (if behavior changed)
- [ ] PR title follows commit-message style (e.g. `fix:`, `feat:`, `chore:`)
